recommendations.title: Lights Out
recommendations.overview: A woman prepares for bed, but realizes that something may be lurking in the shadows.

recommendations.title: Shazam!
recommendations.overview: A boy is given the ability to become an adult superhero in times of need with a single magic word.

recommendations.title: Shazam! Fury of the Gods
recommendations.overview: Billy Batson and his foster siblings, who transform into superheroes by saying "Shazam!", are forced to get back into action and fight the Daughters of Atlas, who they must stop from using a weapon that could destroy the world.

recommendations.title: Lights Out
recommendations.overview: Rebecca must unlock the terror behind her little brother's experiences that once tested her sanity, bringing her face to face with a supernatural spirit attached to their mother.

recommendations.title: Until Dawn

recommendations.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
recommendations.overview: A young boy wins a tour through the most magnificent chocolate factory in the world, led by the world's most unusual candy maker.

recommendations.title: Checkered Ninja
